blended.narrative: Snowshoe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 62°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 57°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
